creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Checking my exentions:

bacula=# select * from pg_extension ;
  oid   | extname | extowner | extnamespace | extrelocatable | extversion | extconfig | extcondition 
--------+---------+----------+--------------+----------------+------------+-----------+--------------
  13964 | plpgsql |       10 |           11 | f              | 1.0        |           | 
 809681 | pg_trgm |       10 |         2200 | t              | 1.6        |           | 
(2 rows)

bacula=# 


pg_trgm is not familiar to me.

plpgsql is there for FreshPorts stored procedures.
